steps.title: Find what the evidence changed
steps.content: The basking shark had been classified as a full ectotherm. Researchers then showed that its body temperature is consistently warmer than the surrounding water, which directly undermines that classification. The blank should describe a position that can no longer be defended.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A describes a grieving person, not a scientific position. Choice C would mean the classification became clearer, but the evidence weakens it. Choice D means unexpected, which could describe the finding but not the status of the classification.

steps.title: Choose the defensibility word
steps.content: The remaining word means unable to be maintained or defended, which fits a classification contradicted by new temperature evidence. The answer is B.
